_comment: Workup profile: 73M with biopsy-confirmed prostate adeno (Gleason 4+5=9) on radical prostatectomy 4 yrs ago, now with rising PSA (current 12.4, doubling time 4 mo) + new bone pain + suspected mets on bone scan. Engine should match WORKUP-METASTATIC-PROSTATE (post-confirmed-disease metastatic-staging workup) and emit Diagnostic Brief — full staging restage with PSMA-PET + germline BRCA panel + somatic HRR panel + testosterone confirmation before mHSPC vs mCRPC Tx selection.

suspicion.presentation: 73M with prostate_cancer_metastatic suspect — biopsy-confirmed prostate adeno (Gleason 4+5=9, pT3a, ISUP 5) on radical prostatectomy 4 yrs ago, post-op PSA nadir 0.05. Rising_psa over past 12 months: 0.05 → 0.8 → 4.2 → 12.4 ng/mL (PSA doubling time 4 months — rapid). New onset of right hip and lumbar back pain × 6 weeks. NM bone scan: increased uptake L3 vertebral body + right iliac wing → bone_metastases suspect. Pelvic MRI: prostate fossa unremarkable, but 2 new pelvic lymph nodes 1.4 + 1.1 cm. Testosterone 480 ng/dL (castrate-sensitive — mhspc vs early progression). Pre-existing hypertension + T2DM + CrCl 62. No prior systemic therapy (post-op surveillance only). Needs PSMA-PET for accurate staging + germline + somatic HRR before Tx (ARPI doublet vs triplet, PARPi if BRCA+).
